reasoning_chain_text: 1. Determine the processor family or processor basis for TEC-1 and Dubna 48K.
2. Compare the processor information and return whether they are based on the same processor family.
original_final_question: Are TEC-1 and Dubna 48K based on the same processor family? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1 and Node 2: The TEC-1 was based on the Zilog Z80 CPU, and the Dubna 48K was based on an analogue of the Zilog Z80 microprocessor, so they were based on the same processor family. -> yes
